ui.how_work_ai: How do you work with AI tools?
ui.level_hint: Adapts question count and generated file detail. Press [1] [2] [3] to select.
ui.select_domain_first: Select a primary domain first to see subdomains.
ui.next_step_title: NEXT STEP — extract ZIP then paste this prompt
ui.next_step_body: Once the ZIP is extracted at your project root, give this command to your AI assistant. It handles everything automatically.
ui.no_spec: No spec — click the button to get started.
ui.spec_desc_ph: Description, business rules, expected behavior, constraints…
ui.skills_hint: Pre-selected based on your answers — adjust freely
ui.commands_hint: Pre-selected based on your answers — adjust freely
ui.jszip_error: JSZip not loaded. Check your connection.
ui.welcome_subtitle: AI Project Setup Wizard — configure in minutes
ui.welcome_agents_line: agents — intelligent selection based on your answers
ui.boot_prompt_tpl: Unzip `{name}-ai-setup.zip` at the root of this project (overwrite existing files if asked), then read `prompts/bootstrap-init.md` and execute every instruction in it without asking for confirmation.
ui.session_restored: Session restored — pick up where you left off.
ui.next_step_auto: Your AI assistant reads the config automatically on the next session.
ui.objectif_q: What is the goal of this configuration?
ui.objectif_hint: Adapts the behaviour of the generated prompt. Press [1] [2] to select.
ui.objectif_improve_warn: [⚠] The generated prompt will not reset your existing configuration
ui.qsel_explain: Toggle questions on/off to tailor the wizard to your needs
ui.board_hint: {n} questions — fill freely, generate when ready
ui.orch_no_orchs: No orchestrations yet — click [+ New] to create one.
ui.orch_manager_hint: Define multi-agent orchestrations for this project
ui.orch_select_agents_first: Select agents first to assign roles.
ui.orch_dep_rule: A must finish before B starts
ui.orch_dep_build_hint: Build the diagram then click a node to add connections
ui.orch_dep_none: No dependencies yet — build the diagram and click a node to add
ui.orch_diagram_hint: Click node → role & note · Click edge → redirect/delete · Drag · Scroll to zoom
ui.orch_no_agents_selected: No agents selected — add agents from the Agents step first, then click Build / Refresh.
ui.orch_no_agents_included: No agents included yet — click + Include above to add agents to the diagram.
ui.orch_role_supervisor_desc: Orchestrates and delegates tasks to other agents
ui.orch_role_critic_desc: Reviews and challenges outputs from other agents
ui.orch_role_router_desc: Dispatches the request to the right specialist
ui.orch_role_validator_desc: Checks outputs meet criteria before passing them on
ui.orch_role_fallback_desc: Handles errors or edge cases when the primary agent fails
ui.orch_type_sequential_desc: Agents in series — output of one becomes input of next
ui.orch_type_parallel_desc: Agents run simultaneously, results aggregated at the end
ui.orch_type_hierarchical_desc: Supervisor directs and coordinates Worker agents
ui.orch_type_router_desc: One agent dynamically selects which specialist handles next
ui.orch_type_debate_desc: Agents critique each other, converging on best answer
ui.orch_type_swarm_desc: Self-organizing agents dynamically pick up tasks
ui.orch_type_hitl_desc: Human validation required at defined checkpoints
ui.orch_type_custom_desc: Free-form connections — design your own topology

landing.meta_description: Configure your AI development environment in under 5 minutes. Choose from 647 agents, 1,611 skills & 128 commands tailored to your stack.
landing.hero_sub: Answer a few questions. Get a complete, production-ready AI configuration — agents, rules, docs — in one ZIP.
landing.slide0_eyebrow: // for the ones who build at 3am
landing.slide0_sub: The gap between what you imagine and what ships isn't talent. It's missing infrastructure. Let's fix that.
landing.slide1_line1: What if your AI knew your stack,
landing.slide1_line2: your rules, before you typed a word?
landing.slide1_sub: 681 specialist agents hand-picked for your project. Pre-loaded with your standards, your architecture, your way of thinking — before session one even begins.
landing.slide2_eyebrow: // from zero to contributor in < 5 min
landing.slide2_sub: Drop the config. Watch your assistant go from generic tool to domain expert — reading every rule, every agent spec, shipping from day zero.
landing.how_sub: Three steps from zero to a fully-configured AI development environment. No boilerplate, no guesswork.
landing.step1_desc: Choose Fast (13 questions), Advanced (27), or Deep (29) mode. The wizard learns your stack, team size, domain, and workflows to build an accurate profile.
landing.step2_desc: Our scoring engine ranks agents by relevance to your stack. Explore 1,623 curated skills and 128 slash commands. Toggle what you need, confirm your selection. Board view for fast review.
landing.step3_title: Download your complete AI config as ZIP
landing.step3_desc: Get your main AI config file, rules, agent specs, architecture docs, and an ADR — ready to drop at your project root and boot immediately.
landing.get_sub: A complete, structured AI configuration that your assistant reads, understands, and acts on from the first message.
landing.fc1_desc: Project context, architecture overview, team conventions, and coding standards — all in one file your AI reads first.
landing.fc2_desc: Curated agents pre-selected for your stack. Each one ships with a persona, scope, capabilities, and example invocations.
landing.fc3_desc: Security, TDD, behavior, and stack-specific rules that enforce your standards on every AI-generated change.
landing.fc4_desc: Architecture overview, glossary, and ADR-001 scaffolded for your project — so the AI understands the why, not just the what.
landing.agents_sub: Hand-picked from 12+ GitHub repositories — plus Finta's exclusive sport, coaching, and holistic libraries. Every domain covered.
landing.feat_sub: Every design decision optimized for the developer who cares about quality, security, and moving fast without breaking things.
landing.bfc1_desc: Our scoring engine analyzes your stack, team, and workflow to surface the exact agents you need. No noise, just the right tools. Every recommendation is ranked with a relevance score above 80.
landing.bfc2_desc: 681 agents, 1,623 skills, and 128 commands — hand-picked from 12+ GitHub repositories plus Finta's exclusive sport, coaching, and holistic libraries. Backend, frontend, security, AI/ML, DevOps, sport performance — every specialty covered.
landing.bfc3_desc: Drop the ZIP at your project root, paste one prompt. Your AI assistant reads every rule, every agent spec, and starts contributing immediately. From download to first commit in under 5 minutes. Works for new and existing projects.
landing.demo_sub: A real wizard session — Advanced mode, TypeScript + React stack.
landing.demo_hint: // static preview — launch the wizard for the real experience
landing.cta_sub: 681 agents are waiting for the right project. Give your AI the context it needs — in under 5 minutes. New project or existing codebase.
landing.cta_note: free · no account · works with Claude Code, Cursor & Copilot
landing.foot_copy: // built for developers — and coaches, and athletes, and humans
landing.project_sub: Finta works for both. The wizard adapts its output to where you are — blank repo or 3-year-old monorepo.
landing.path_new_desc: Starting from zero? Perfect. Tell the wizard your stack, domain, and team size. In 13–29 questions you'll have a complete AI configuration — agents, rules, architecture docs — ready to drop at your project root.
landing.path_new_step1: Answer 13 questions (Fast) or up to 29 (Deep mode)
landing.path_new_step2: Scoring engine picks the right agents for your stack
landing.path_new_step3: Get CLAUDE.md, agents/, rules/, docs/ — all generated
landing.path_new_step4: Drop the ZIP, paste one prompt, start building
landing.path_exist_title: Running project → AI that finally gets it
landing.path_exist_desc: Already mid-build? The wizard generates a config that fits your existing architecture — not a blank-slate template. Describe what you're building, your pain points, your current workflow.
landing.path_exist_step1: Describe your existing stack and architecture
landing.path_exist_step2: Select agents for your active pain points
landing.path_exist_step3: Config layers on top of your project, not replaces it
landing.path_exist_step4: Your AI reads your existing conventions immediately
